3276470.name: Grid Ranger Demo
3276470.description:
GRID RANGER is a short, hyperspeed 3D shmuplike with laser sharp aesthetics and a retro-futuristic soundtrack.

This demo contains only one level. The full version contains three.

  • Mouse-oriented controls for extra precision and agility
  • Uses the V99 vector engine (like its sister game UTOPIA MUST FALL) for a clean & classic look
  • Original music by Miles Tilmann, composer for NOVA DRIFT
